title: EB and CC have update - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will be displayed
scenario: Firmware update popup incorrectly prompts Lens Desktop for Charge Case update after Earbuds DFU completes
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a device is connected that has firmware updates available for both the Charge Case (CC) and Earbuds (EB).
3. Tap the update button displayed on the Home screen.
4. On the firmware update screen, tap the update button for the Earbuds.
5. Observe that the Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Earbuds starts and completes successfully.
6. Return to the device Home screen.
expected: After returning to the device Home screen, a popup is displayed informing the user that Lens Desktop is needed to update the Charge Case.
